title: Simpler Potion Particles
description: Make potion particle effects less distracting.
body:
# Overview
This resource pack aims to make the potion particle effects less distracting while not taking them away completely.

Instead of big flashy swirls covering half of your screen, this pack makes it to where the potion particles are smaller and at half the opacity.

# Download
- Simply download the **Simpler Potion Particles** pack from modrinth.com
- Open Minecraft and navigate to Options > Resource Packs and then Open Pack Folder
- And just drag and drop the resource pack file into the folder

# Versions
Available for 1.20-26.1.1 currently.
